content: Remote OK HR Generalist Check Off Your List <strong>About Check Off Your List<br><br></strong>This is a remote position; however, we are currently hiring team members based in Florida, Georgia, Maine, Ohio, and Texas.<br><br>Have you been looking for a professional opportunity to grow your career, expand your expertise, and make a meaningful impact on small businesses?<br><br>Check Off Your List (COYL) is a business support team composed of executive assistants, human resources specialists, marketing professionals, and bookkeepers. We are seeking talented individuals to join our dynamic team as we continue to grow rapidly.<br><br>We are expanding our HR capabilities and are seeking a part-time HR Generalist who will support internal HR operations for COYL and provide HR services to our clients as part of our outsourced HR offering.<br><br>This role starts at 10 hours a week but can quickly grow from there.<br><br>Role Overview<br><br><strong>The HR Generalist Will Serve In Two Complementary Capacities<br><br></strong><ul><li>Internal HR Practitioner Supporting COYL's internal HR processes, documentation, compliance, recruiting, and employee experience.</li><li>Client-Facing HR Support Specialist Delivering HR tasks, projects, and support for multiple clients across various industries.<br><br></li></ul>Success in this role requires excellent communication, time management skills, adaptability, strong organizational skills, and a service-oriented mindset.<br><br>Key Responsibilities<br><br>Internal Support for COYL<br><br><ul><li>Assist with COYL hiring needs, including job postings, applicant screening, and interview coordination.</li><li>Support onboarding and offboarding processes for internal team members.</li><li>Maintain accurate HR documentation, including handbooks, policies, and compliance files.</li><li>Assist with employee relations, engagement activities, internal communication, and culture initiatives.</li><li>Track HR metrics, employee files, review schedules, and required documentation.<br><br></li></ul>Client-Facing HR Support<br><br>You will support COYL clients by performing a wide range of HR activities, including but not limited to:<br><br><ul><li>Plan and support employee engagement initiatives (e.g., team-building events, virtual happy hours).</li><li>Audit and enhance client onboarding and offboarding processes.</li><li>Track, organize, and support client employee concerns and HR-related communication.</li><li>Assist with salary and benefits audits.</li><li>Support employee benefits questions and documentation.</li><li>Create topicâspecific training programs.</li><li>Prepare employee development tracks and performance-management tools.</li><li>Create, update, and organize review templates.</li><li>Assist with scheduling and coordinating performance reviews.</li><li>Track documentation to ensure state compliance.</li><li>Draft job descriptions and post roles on approved platforms.</li><li>Conduct screening calls and assist with interview coordination.</li><li>Run background checks, prepare offer letters, and support client hiring workflows.</li><li>Monitor national and state employment law updates relevant to client locations.</li><li>Prepare and maintain stateâspecific compliance forms.</li><li>Create, edit, or update employee handbooks.</li><li>Assist clients in developing mission, vision, and values statements.</li><li>Support the creation and refinement of HR policies and procedures.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Qualifications<br><br></strong><ul><li>Strong understanding of HR fundamentals, compliance, and employment practices.</li><li>Experience supporting multiple stakeholders, clients, or departments simultaneously.</li><li>Excellent communication and relationship-building skills.</li><li>High professionalism, confidentiality, and emotional intelligence.</li><li>Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks across multiple clients.</li><li>Techâsavvy and comfortable working in a remote environment.<br><br></li></ul>What We Offer<br><br><ul><li>Flexible partâtime schedule</li><li>Fully remote role</li><li>Opportunity to support a wide variety of businesses</li><li>A collaborative and supportive HR team</li><li>Meaningful work that helps both COYL and our clients thrive</li><li>As a familyâfriendly organization that embraces the realities of remote work, COYL understands that working from home means working within the natural rhythms of home life.
